items.title: Good night from the Thomas & Mack Center.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Good night from the Thomas & Mack Center.

At the nearby Cox Pavilion, the Celtics kicked off Summer League by rallying for a win over the Raptors in an OT thriller.

Amile Jefferson: “I thought we did a great job of, every time they threw punches at us…we fought back…We never wavered.”

Nice pair of dunks to close the half though!

items.title: Still a work-in-progress for Khaman Maluach. Wasn't able to sniff out that backdoor cut and contest at the rim, threw in an inbounds pass that got stolen, and had space to drive and kinda fumbled the ball off the dribble before drawing a foul.
items.author: Gerald Bourguet
items.body_excerpt:
Still a work-in-progress for Khaman Maluach. Wasn't able to sniff out that backdoor cut and contest at the rim, threw in an inbounds pass that got stolen, and had space to drive and kinda fumbled the ball off the dribble before drawing a foul.

Not overreacting, just observing
